title: legacy-data-migration-isolation
description: Implement the operational migration slice for legacy default-tenant backfill, dry-run verification, rollback, and tenant isolation enforcement evidence. Read slices/TMP-011-migration-and-data-isolation/slice.yaml, domain-grounding, story-craft, roadmap-to-slices, and value-gate artifacts before editing. Include a concise Claude critique attempt before implementation and record the result in the slice artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: make db-migrate-tenant-platform-dry-run exists and reports table-level row counts, unmapped rows, conflict counts, and constraint readiness without mutating production data
make db-migrate-tenant-platform exists and backfills eligible legacy rows to tenant_key=legacy-default in an idempotent batched migration path
make db-rollback-tenant-platform exists or an equivalent reviewed rollback script preserves original data and restores nullable tenant compatibility
TMP-011 value-gate report maps every happy, failure, edge, and invariant criterion to named evidence
Existing single-tenant Ghana/TIMWE compatibility is covered by smoke, repository, or SQL verification evidence

title: admin-portal-tenant-workspace
description: Implement tenant workspace route guards, tenant selector posture, and tenant API denial handling for frontend/webspa-admin according to slices/TMP-014-admin-portal-tenant-workspace/slice.yaml.
acceptance_criteria: Tenant admins see tenant workspace context and tenant-scoped navigation only
URL tampering or missing tenant assignment produces an explicit denial or empty-state path
Slice value-gate report names tests or manual evidence for happy, failure, edge, and invariant criteria

title: platform-ops-secret-observability
description: Implement platform ops hardening for secret hygiene, tenant/channel metric labels, dashboards, and production checklist according to slices/TMP-015-platform-ops-secret-observability/slice.yaml.
acceptance_criteria: Credential-shaped config is documented or guarded without exposing secret material
Tenant/channel observability labels and dashboards avoid PII and high-cardinality values
Secret backend unavailable and unsafe local config failure modes are covered by value-gate evidence

title: partner-channel-onboarding-contracts
description: Create versioned tenant/channel onboarding contracts, callback signature guidance, credential posture, sandbox fixtures, and postback examples according to slices/TMP-016-partner-channel-onboarding-contracts/slice.yaml.
acceptance_criteria: Onboarding document names tenant/channel API, callback, credential, sandbox, and postback contracts
Sandbox fixtures include supported and unsupported capability examples plus legacy mapping ambiguity
Slice value-gate report maps contract criteria to concrete files and examples
